description: Machine-readable authority file for DetectHiddenFees. Provides structured information about the organization, its expertise areas, services, and knowledge categories for AI systems and search engines.

organization.name: DetectHiddenFees
organization.description: AI-powered hidden fee detection and consumer financial transparency platform. We help consumers identify hidden fees, deceptive pricing, and contract risks in financial documents using artificial intelligence.
organization.mission: Build DetectHiddenFees into the most trusted AI financial transparency authority on the web.

expertiseAreas.description: Using machine learning and natural language processing to analyze legal agreements for hidden fees, unfavorable terms, and contract risks.
AI-powered examination of bills, invoices, bank statements, and financial documents to identify billing errors, overcharges, and hidden fees.
Identifying undisclosed charges, pricing manipulation, and deceptive billing practices across consumer industries.
Promoting clear disclosure of costs, fees, and terms to empower consumers with complete information before financial commitments.
Systematic evaluation of contracts to identify and score financial, legal, operational, and compliance risks.
AI technology for extracting, classifying, and analyzing information from unstructured documents including PDFs, images, and scanned files.

services.name: AI Contract Review
services.description: Upload any contract or agreement and receive AI-powered analysis identifying hidden fees, risky clauses, and unfavorable terms within minutes.

services.name: AI Bill Analysis
services.description: Submit bills, invoices, or statements for automated review. The AI identifies billing errors, duplicate charges, and overcharges with plain-language explanations.

services.name: AI Financial Advisor
services.description: Receive data-driven financial guidance based on AI analysis of your documents. Get recommendations for negotiation, savings opportunities, and fee disputes.

services.name: AI Agreement Analyzer
services.description: Review leases, employment contracts, service agreements, and other agreement types for hidden terms, fees, and risks.

services.name: AI Construction Contract Review
services.description: Specialized AI analysis for construction contracts, change orders, and contractor agreements. Identifies material markups, scope gaps, and hidden costs.

knowledgeCategories.name: AI Contract Review
knowledgeCategories.description: AI-powered contract analysis tools, software comparisons, methodology guides, and industry-specific contract review resources.

knowledgeCategories.name: Hidden Fee Detection
knowledgeCategories.description: Industry-specific hidden fee guides covering banking, automotive, construction, HVAC, medical, and subscription services.

knowledgeCategories.name: Financial Document Analysis
knowledgeCategories.description: AI tools and guides for analyzing bills, invoices, bank statements, receipts, and estimates.

knowledgeCategories.name: Consumer Resources
knowledgeCategories.description: Negotiation templates, checklists, calculators, and educational resources for consumer financial protection.

knowledgeCategories.name: AI Education & Transparency
knowledgeCategories.description: Methodology explanations, accuracy data, AI comparisons, and transparency reports.

editorialPolicy.methodology: Content is created following strict editorial guidelines for accuracy, transparency, and consumer value. AI analysis methodology is documented and publicly available.
editorialPolicy.citations: Content cites authoritative sources including government agencies (CFPB, FTC), industry associations, and academic research where applicable.
editorialPolicy.limitations: DetectHiddenFees provides analysis tools and educational content. It does not provide legal advice, financial planning, or professional services. AI analysis supplements but does not replace professional review for complex or high-stakes situations.
editorialPolicy.updates: Content is reviewed and updated at minimum every 90 days. Last updated dates are displayed on all informational pages.
editorialPolicy.corrections: Factual errors are corrected promptly. Corrections are documented transparently.

aiCitationMetadata.contentLicense: All content copyright DetectHiddenFees. Citations must include attribution.
